titleZh: 姚锦城与鸿大（上海）投资管理有限公司、章歌等公司决议纠纷案
titleEn: Gazette Case: Yao Jincheng v. Hongda (Shanghai) Investment Management Co., Ltd. et al.
citation: 公报案例：出资期限决议
holdingZh: 除法律规定或存在其他合理紧迫事由外，认缴出资期限涉及股东期限利益，不得由控股股东以多数决方式单方提前并损害少数股东权益；相关决议可被确认无效。
holdingEn: Absent a statutory basis or other urgent justification, contribution deadlines implicate individual shareholder timing interests and cannot be unilaterally accelerated by majority vote to the detriment of minority shareholders; such a resolution may be declared invalid.
